---
title: "On Turkey's Bloody Friday"
description: "It's one thing to feel oppressed, but it's another thing to feel alone. Spread the word."
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 06-02-2013
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories:
  - news
  - politics
preview: images/20130612-turkey-bloody-friday-preview.jpg
---

```{r out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20130612-turkey-bloody-friday.jpg")
```
